channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [POOJAENT] Vashu Bhagnani Industries Approves FY26 Results, Director, NSE Listing
item.description:
Vashu Bhagnani Industries Ltd's Board of Directors approved the Audited Financial Results (standalone and consolidated) for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026, with unmodified audit opinions. The Board also appointed Mr. Ashish Radheyshyam Goyal as an Additional Non-Executive Independent Director for five years, effective April 10, 2026. Furthermore, the company approved a proposal for direct listing of its equity shares on the National Stock Exchange of India Limited (NSE), subject to necessary approvals. Separately, the Board noted a non-material clerical error in a subsidiary's books, confirming it does not impact the holding company's financial statements or require restatement.

  • Board approved Audited Financial Results for FY26 with unmodified audit opinions.
  • Mr. Ashish Radheyshyam Goyal appointed as Additional Independent Director.
  • Company approved direct listing of equity shares on the NSE.
  • Clerical error in subsidiary's books deemed non-material, no restatement needed.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: POOJA ENTERTAINMENT AND FILMS LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [AMIRCHAND] Amir Chand Jagdish Kumar Board Approves Q3/9M FY26 Unaudited Results
item.description:
Amir Chand Jagdish Kumar (Exports) Ltd announced the revised outcome of its Board meeting held on April 16, 2026. The Board approved the unaudited standalone financial results for the quarter and nine months ended December 31, 2025. These results were reviewed by the Audit Committee and prepared in accordance with Indian Accounting Standards. The statutory auditor, Pramod K. Sharma & Co., issued an unmodified limited review report. The company also noted the completion of its Initial Public Offer (IPO) on April 2, 2026, with equity shares listed on NSE and BSE. IPO proceeds of ₹4,111.14 million (net of estimated offer expenses) were received, with the full amount remaining unutilized as of December 31, 2025, earmarked for working capital and general corporate purposes. The company assessed no material impact from the New Labour Codes on gratuity obligations.

  • Board approved unaudited standalone financial results for Q3 and 9M ended December 31, 2025.
  • Statutory auditors issued an unmodified limited review report on the financial results.
  • Company completed its IPO on April 2, 2026, listing on NSE and BSE.
  • IPO proceeds of ₹4,111.14 million were received and remained unutilized as of December 31, 2025.
  • New Labour Codes had no material incremental impact on gratuity obligations.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Amir Chand Jagdish Kumar (Exports) Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [POOJAENT] Vashu Bhagnani Board Notes Clerical Error in Subsidiary, No Financial Impact
item.description:
The Board of Directors of Vashu Bhagnani Industries Limited, at its meeting on April 16, 2026, addressed a clerical error identified in the books of accounts of a subsidiary. The Board concluded that this error does not have any material impact on the subsidiary's financial statements. Furthermore, the Company's Statutory Auditors confirmed that the error does not necessitate any revision or restatement of the Indian holding company's financial statements. Based on this assessment, the Board decided that no revision of the Company's financial statements is warranted, and the previously approved and submitted financial statements are considered final and conclusive.

  • Vashu Bhagnani Board met on April 16, 2026.
  • A clerical error was found in a subsidiary's books of accounts.
  • The error has no material impact on the subsidiary's financial statements.
  • Statutory Auditors confirmed no revision is needed for the holding company's financials.
  • Previously submitted financial statements remain final and conclusive.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: POOJA ENTERTAINMENT AND FILMS LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [ABDL] ABD Maestro Wins 'Distiller of the Year' at Icons of Whisky India Awards
item.description:
Allied Blenders & Distillers' super-premium and luxury spirits subsidiary, ABD Maestro Pvt. Ltd., has been named 'Distiller of the Year' at the 15th Icons of Whisky India Awards 2026. This recognition coincides with ABD Maestro's first anniversary, during which it established a portfolio of ten brands. Additionally, its ARTHAUS Blended Malt Scotch Whisky received the 'Campaign Innovator of the Year' award. ABD Maestro was the sole Indian company to secure the 'Distiller of the Year' title alongside six international players, underscoring India's rising prominence in the global whisky market. The awards affirm ABD Maestro's commitment to craftsmanship, innovation, and quality in India's evolving super-premium spirits landscape.

  • ABD Maestro, a subsidiary, won 'Distiller of the Year' at Icons of Whisky India Awards 2026.
  • The award marks ABD Maestro's first anniversary and portfolio of ten brands.
  • ARTHAUS Blended Malt Scotch also won 'Campaign Innovator of the Year'.
  • ABD Maestro was the only Indian company to win 'Distiller of the Year'.
  • This highlights the company's growing presence in premium spirits segment.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Allied Blenders and Distillers Ltd | Category: Award

item.title: [AMIRCHAND] Amir Chand Jagdish Kumar (Exports) Ltd Board Approves Unaudited Q3/9M FY26 Results
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Amir Chand Jagdish Kumar (Exports) Ltd's Board of Directors, following review by the Audit Committee, approved the unaudited standalone financial results for the quarter and nine months ended December 31, 2025, on April 16, 2026. These results were prepared in accordance with Indian Accounting Standards (IND AS). The statutory auditor, Pramod K. Sharma & Co., issued unmodified limited review reports on the standalone financial results for the nine-month period. The company also announced the completion of its Initial Public Offer (IPO) on April 2, 2026, with equity shares listed on NSE and BSE. Net proceeds of ₹4111.14 million from the fresh issue were received, with ₹4000.00 million earmarked for working capital and ₹111.14 million for general corporate purposes, all remaining unutilized as of December 31, 2025. An assessment of the New Labour Codes indicated no material incremental impact on the company's gratuity obligations.

  • Board approved unaudited Q3 and nine-month financial results for Dec 31, 2025.
  • Statutory Auditor issued unmodified limited review reports on standalone results.
  • IPO completed April 2, 2026; shares listed on NSE and BSE.
  • ₹4111.14 million net IPO proceeds received, unutilized by Dec 31, 2025.
  • New Labour Codes had no material impact on gratuity obligations.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Amir Chand Jagdish Kumar (Exports) Ltd | Category: Quarterly Updates

item.title: [ONESOURCE] Onesource Specialty Pharma gets '73' ESG rating from NSE Sustainability
item.description:
Onesource Specialty Pharma Limited has received an Environmental, Social, and Governance (ESG) Rating of '73' from NSE Sustainability Ratings & Analytics Limited for the financial year FY25. This rating places the company in the 'Leader' category. NSE Sustainability independently assigned this rating based on publicly available information pertaining to FY25, without any engagement from OneSource Specialty Pharma Limited.

  • Onesource Specialty Pharma received an ESG rating of '73'.
  • The rating was independently assigned by NSE Sustainability.
  • The company falls into the 'Leader' category for FY25.
  • Rating was based on publicly available information, not company engagement.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Onesource Specialty Pharma Ltd | Category: ESG

item.title: [JAICORPLTD] Jai Corp: Special window for physical securities dematerialization
item.description:
Jai Corp Ltd. has issued a notice regarding a special window for the transfer and dematerialization of physical securities, as per SEBI Circular dated January 30, 2026. This window is specifically for securities sold or purchased prior to April 01, 2019, and will remain open until February 04, 2027. It also accommodates transfer requests that were previously rejected or returned due to deficiencies. Securities transferred through this window will be mandatorily credited in demat mode and will be subject to a one-year lock-in period, during which they cannot be transferred, lien-marked, or pledged. Cases involving disputes or securities already transferred to the IEPF are excluded. Shareholders can contact KFin Technologies Limited for assistance.

  • SEBI opens special window for physical securities dematerialization.
  • Applies to securities sold/purchased before April 1, 2019.
  • Window open until February 4, 2027 for eligible transfers.
  • Transferred securities will have a one-year lock-in period.
  • Rejected transfer requests can be resubmitted via this window.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: JAI CORP LTD. | Category: Regulatory

item.title: [EIEL] Enviro Infra Engineers' order book grows by ₹2,240 Cr since March 2026
item.description:
Enviro Infra Engineers Limited (EIEL) has significantly strengthened its order book by securing new orders worth over ₹2,240 crore since March 2026. This includes more than ₹1,170 crore from the water and wastewater segment and over ₹1,070 crore from the renewable energy segment. The total order book now stands at over ₹4,600 crore, providing clear revenue visibility for the next 15-24 months, with approximately ₹2,000 crore expected in FY2027. A key development is the company's entry into the Battery Energy Storage System (BESS) segment with four NTPC projects valued at ₹1,070 crore. EIEL also secured substantial water treatment projects in Bihar and Maharashtra, reinforcing its core business and geographical presence.

  • Order book increased by ₹2,240 crore since March 2026.
  • Total order book exceeds ₹4,600 crore, ensuring 15-24 months revenue visibility.
  • Entered Battery Energy Storage System (BESS) segment with ₹1,070 crore NTPC projects.
  • Secured significant water treatment projects in Bihar and Maharashtra.
  • Forecasts approximately ₹2,000 crore revenue visibility for FY2027.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Enviro Infra Engineers Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [ELITECON] Elitecon Bags ₹2.02 Bn Long-Term Supply Order for Tobacco Products
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Elitecon International Ltd has secured a long-term supply contract valued at approximately ₹2.02 Billion from Bozza Tobacco (PTY) Ltd, a South African entity. This two-year agreement, effective April 6, 2026, involves the supply of cigarettes and other tobacco-allied products, including brands like Red and Black, B&W, Cape, Ossum, and Golden Flake. The contract provides Elitecon with steady export visibility, supports efficient utilization of manufacturing capacities, and strengthens its presence in the South African market. It aligns with the company's strategy to expand exports and build a sustainable business model, expected to contribute positively to business stability and long-term growth, marking a significant entry into the African continent. Payment terms are set at 90 days after delivery.

  • Secured ₹2.02 Bn long-term contract for tobacco products.
  • Contract with South Africa's Bozza Tobacco for two years.
  • Enhances export visibility and strengthens African market presence.
  • Supports manufacturing capacity utilization and business stability.
  • Expected to drive long-term growth and international expansion.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Elitecon International Ltd | Category: Deals

item.title: [PCJEWELLER] PC Jeweller: Pooja Garg's Stake Rises to 3.67% via Warrant Conversion
item.description:
Pooja Garg, a promoter of PC Jeweller Ltd, increased her direct shareholding in the company through the conversion of Fully Convertible Warrants into equity shares. Her stake in shares carrying voting rights rose from 1.62% to 3.67%. The acquisition involved the payment of the balance 75% of the issue price as per SEBI regulations. While Pooja Garg's individual holding increased, the overall promoter and Persons Acting in Concert (PAC) group holding, including Balram Garg and Balram Garg (HUF), remained stable at 29.30% of the total voting capital. The company's total diluted share capital increased from ₹9710534855 to ₹9807757077 post-conversion. This disclosure was made under Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.

  • Pooja Garg increased her direct stake in PC Jeweller.
  • Her voting shareholding rose from 1.62% to 3.67%.
  • Acquisition was through conversion of warrants into equity.
  • Overall promoter/PAC group holding remained at 29.30%.
  • Company's diluted share capital increased post-conversion.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: PC JEWELLER LTD. | Category: Shareholding
